case_title: MENDOZA MOISES & CRISTINA et al VS TAYLOR HOMER et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR HOMER

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MENDOZA MOISES & CRISTINA CARAVACA ROMEO & ESTELLA POLICARPIO RUPERT & FLORDELIZA CAJILIG LEOVIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAYLOR HOMER TAYLOR FRANCES $350.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $378.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOT. OF JUDGMENT TO DEFEND, RETURNED, MOVED.
